name: Germany (Logic & Authenticity)
culture_notes: Honest Gameplay: Direct recording of game mechanics without overly flashy fake filters.
Depth & Strategy: Show tech trees, complex building layouts, or tactical troop formations.
The 'Fairness' Factor: Emphasize 'No Pay-to-Win' or 'Skill-based' elements.
Authority & Certification: Using ratings, awards, or 'Made by [Studio Name]' builds significant trust.

visual_specs.typography: Clean, structured, professional fonts. No 'childish' bubbly text.
visual_specs.color_palette: Realistic, slightly desaturated colors. Avoid 'neon' unless it's Cyberpunk.
visual_specs.pacing: Steady and informative. Let the viewer 'read' the UI and understand the strategy.

preferred_bgm: Deep, atmospheric, or industrial soundtracks. Minimalist and non-distracting.
taboo: General extreme violence or severe local offenses
